message:
fix(storage): whitelist table/column pairs in has_missing_issue_reference

The function builds SQL queries via string interpolation on caller-
supplied table and column names. Add an explicit allowlist of known
safe pairs to prevent potential SQL injection if the function is ever
called with untrusted input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
